items.title: At Least 14 Killed in Bombing Attack That Derailed a Train in Pakistan
items.summary: The explosion was so powerful that several nearby buildings were damaged and a resident 15 miles away was jolted awake by the blast. A separatist group claimed responsibility.
items.whyItMatters: It adds one useful signal to the current news mix without turning XLB into an overwhelming news feed.

items.title: Large-scale Russian attack on Ukraine leaves four dead and dozens injured
items.summary: The Oreshnik missile, which reportedly travels over 10 times the speed of sound, was used, Russia has confirmed.
